task_title: Annotate slide 6 with blue directional arrows
instruction: Open slide 6 and add a large down arrow above the left image with a blue gradient fill.

window_merge_decisions.reason: The next step directly continues configuring the same first gradient stop color: it starts from the palette opened in the previous step and proceeds to the custom color dialog for that same control.

The next step directly continues the same gradient-stop color edit: the palette opened in s20 is the visible starting state in s21, and s21 simply drills into the custom color picker for that same second stop.

task_goal: The target slide is active and the first annotation arrow is placed, positioned, and styled correctly above the left image.

action_preconditions: The presentation is open in editing mode and the Slides pane is visible.

nl_position: the thumbnail of slide 6 in the left Slides pane

steps.action_before_state: LibreOffice Impress is open with a presentation titled "multimedia_classroom_podium-2020.pptx". The current slide, Slide 1 of 23, is displayed in Normal view and shows the title "Multimedia Classroom Podium Tutorial and User Guide" with a subtitle "Button Style Podium". The slide contains descriptive text about ITS-managed multimedia classrooms and features an image of a button-style control panel. On the left, a slide thumbnail pane shows all slides, with Slide 6 currently selected and highlighted. The Properties panel on the right displays slide settings including Format (On-screen w:4:3), Orientation (Landscape), Background (None), and Master Slide (Blank Slide). Layout options are visible below. The application menu bar includes File, Edit, View, Insert, Format, Slide, Slide Show, Tools, Window, Help. The system clock shows Mar 26 10:43.
action_after_effects: Slide 6 becomes the active slide in the main canvas.
steps.nl_explanation: Click slide 6 to start editing the slide that needs arrow annotations.

action_preconditions: Slide 6 is active and the main menu bar is visible.

nl_position: the Insert label in the top menu bar

steps.action_before_state: The screenshot shows the LibreOffice Impress application open with a presentation titled "multimedia_classroom_podium-2020.pptx". The screenshot shows the LibreOffice Impress application open with a presentation titled "multimedia_classroom_podium-2020.pptx". The active slide is number 6 of 23, displaying content about connecting a laptop to a multimedia podium.
